## Project Hub
**Status:** Merged into Asgard (id=46)
**Was live at:** https://paddygallivan.github.io/project-hub/
**Repo:** github.com/PaddyGallivan/project-hub

### What it was
Original project tracker dashboard. HTML page on GitHub Pages reading from Cloudflare D1 via a Worker API. Showed 30+ projects with status, revenue forecasts, links.

### Architecture
- Frontend: static HTML/JS on GitHub Pages
- Backend: CF Worker querying D1 asgard-brain
- No auth, read-only public view

### Why merged
Superseded by Asgard dashboard (id=46) which adds PIN auth, edit flows, AI chat, rich modals, real-time D1 writes.
rows.recommendations: Project Hub is fully absorbed into Asgard. No further action needed — archive this row if D1 cleanup is ever revisited.

## Bomber Boat
**Live:** https://bomberboat.com.au
**Repo:** github.com/PaddyGallivan/bomber-boat
**Worker:** bomber-boat-api v9.19 on Luck Dragon Main (a6f47c17)
**D1:** bomber-boat-db UUID c7dda294-5bba-41c1-a85d-bcc5a9bf1d29
**Deploy:** push to main -> GH Actions -> wrangler pages deploy + wrangler deploy --keep-vars

### Architecture
- Frontend: Single-file HTML/JS SPA on CF Pages project bomber-boat
- Backend: bomber-boat-api — bookings, auth, Stripe webhooks, admin APIs
- D1: bookings, games, seat manifests, staff records
- Stripe: AUD weekly payouts, Luck Dragon Pty Ltd, 2-day delay
- Email: Resend bookings@ + hello@bomberboat.com.au (DKIM+SPF+DMARC)
- Inbound: CF Email Routing -> pgallivan@outlook.com

### Roles: Admin /admin ($Falkor2967), Captain /captain (bomberboatcaptain), Staff /staff (bomberstaff)

### Key docs: docs/HANDOVER.md, docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, docs/OPERATOR-EMAIL.md

rows.detail_md:
## KBT Platform
**Live (host app):** https://luckdragonasgard.github.io/kbt-trivia-tools/host-app.html
**Repo:** github.com/LuckDragonAsgard/kbt-trivia-tools (GH Pages, auto-deploy ~25s)
**Resume:** https://raw.githubusercontent.com/LuckDragonAsgard/kbt-trivia-tools/main/RESUME-HERE.md

### Architecture
- Frontend: Static HTML/JS on GitHub Pages (host-app, player-app, admin-app, wrap, question-candidates)
- DB: Supabase huvfgenbcaiicatvtxak.supabase.co (ap-southeast-2, 35 tables)
- AI Worker: kbt-api.pgallivan.workers.dev (fact-check, ai-text, fal-morph, fal-faceswap, fal-inpaint, fal-rembg, generate-slides)
- Question Engine: kbt-question-engine.pgallivan.workers.dev — 6hr cron, scrape->Claude->double-fact-check->quality score->kbt_question_candidates
- Deploy: push to main -> GH Pages in ~25s

### Question pipeline
Scrape (Wikipedia/Reddit TIL/On This Day) -> Claude drafts -> FC1 accuracy -> FC2 devil's advocate -> score /50 -> 35+ pending_review, 45+ APPROVED, <35 rejected

### Google Slides: OAuth2 refresh token. Client ID 342815819710. Secrets: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID/SECRET/REFRESH_TOKEN on worker.
rows.recommendations: KBT needs a paying customer. Build a one-click 'host your own trivia night' SaaS tier at $29/mo. Add question pack marketplace. Fix KBT live at a real venue this month.

rows.description: Combined institutional sport platform for Australian schools — Williamstown District -> VIC -> national. Includes carnival management (athletics, swimming, cross country, multi-day), district-to-state pathway, real-time timing, results, house points, Stripe payments. Unifies prior District Sport, SportCarnival, SSV Sport Takeover, WPS Athletics 2026 into one product. Pricing: $1/student/year. AU TAM = 3.6M students (~$3.6M ceiling).
rows.next_action: VIC pilot rollout — 36k students ($1 each) Y1, scale to 5%, 15%, 35%, 60% of AU 3.6M by Y5
rows.notes: A/B/C regressions fixed 2026-04-28 mona session

## School Sport Portal
**Live:** https://schoolsportportal.com.au
**Repo:** github.com/LuckDragonAsgard/schoolsportportal
**Domains:** schoolsportportal.com.au, sportcarnival.com.au, carnivaltiming.com
**CF account:** a6f47c17811ee2f8b6caeb8f38768c20

### Architecture
- Frontend: HTML/JS SPA + React on CF Pages project schoolsportportal
- Backend: CF Worker schoolsportportal serving /api/* routes
- Firebase: willy-district-sport (australia-southeast1), SDK v9.23.0 compat layer
- NS pair: coraline + renan (VentraIP)

### Pending browser action
Zone route schoolsportportal.com.au/* has Worker = None. Fix: CF Dashboard -> zone -> Workers -> Routes -> Edit -> select schoolsportportal -> Save.

### Scope
4-domain school sports SaaS. 1,600 VIC schools / 232 districts / 55 divisions / 16 regions.

### Financials
$500/yr per school. Y1 $36k, Y2 $180k, Y3 $540k
rows.recommendations: Productise for district rollout. Pitch to 5 schools directly — $500/yr each. Add automated carnival schedule PDF export. Integrate with WPS Hub timing data.

rows.detail_md:
## Carnival Timing
**Live:** https://carnivaltiming.com
**Repo:** github.com/PaddyGallivan/carnival-timing
**CF Pages:** carnival-timing on Luck Dragon Main
**WS Worker:** carnival-timing-ws.pgallivan.workers.dev (Durable Object host)
**Version:** v8.2

### Architecture
- Frontend: Single-file HTML/JS SPA on CF Pages (no build step)
- Real-time: Cloudflare Durable Object (CarnivalRoom) over WebSocket
- Custom Firebase-compatible DO client (no actual Firebase SDK — const firebase = {} wrapper)
- Worker: carnival-timing-ws hosts the DO for WebSocket rooms

### Features (v8.2)
- Track/Field: arm -> countdown -> GO -> splits per lane -> multi-timer averaging
- DQ flags, heat picker (Heat 1/2/3/Final/none)
- Admin PIN gate (numpad, stored in carnivalMeta.adminPin via DO)
- CSV export of all published results
- XC marshal bib queue (tap-to-time + FIFO)
- Video finish: SWIM (per-lane column brightness) + TRACK (whole-frame pixel diff)

### Financials
Y1 $15k, Y2 $60k, Y3 $150k
rows.recommendations: Package carnival-timing as a SaaS product for carnival coordinators. $99/carnival or $499/yr subscription. Build a public demo link for cold outreach to schools.

## WPS Staff Hub (CRT app)
**Status:** Parked
**Repo:** github.com/LuckDragonAsgard/wps-staff-hub
**Snapshot (broken backend):** https://wps-staff-hub.pgallivan.workers.dev

### Architecture
- Backend: Express.js + Turso libSQL (SQLite-compatible cloud DB)
- Notifications: Twilio SMS + SendGrid email
- Auth: JWT tokens
- Hosting history: Render -> Vercel -> CF Worker static snapshot (backend not running)

### Security note
Turso API token in git history of wps-staff-hub repo. HEAD commit 90c9148 stripped it but token still in history — rotate via Turso dashboard before reviving.

### What it does
CRT absence + booking system for Williamstown Primary. Staff report absences, system finds available CRTs, sends SMS/email.

### Why parked
Replaced by WPS Hub v3 (id=51). CRT booking may be added to WPS Hub v3 later.
rows.recommendations: WPS Staff Hub is parked — decide: continue with CRT booking or pivot to full school admin SaaS. If continuing, add SMS notifications for last-minute shifts.

rows.description: School sport administration platform for Victorian schools. Eliminates $8.36M/yr in manual admin across 1,600 schools, 232 districts, 55 divisions, 16 regions. Four tools: SchoolSportPortal, SportCarnival, CarnivalTiming, SportPortal. $1/student/yr + $150/250/500 coordinator tiers.
rows.notes: Consolidated into School Sport Portal (id 11) on 2026-04-28
rows.scale_notes: TAM: ~4M Australian students, ~2.3M primary across ~9,500 primary schools. $1/student/yr = $2.3M at full primary saturation + coordinator tiers. VIC alone: 1,600 schools, ~512k primary students. Houseplay (closest competitor) charges $245-$495/yr per school for single-school carnival day only. SportPortal does 10x more at lower cost with no equivalent in the district/coordinator tier space.
rows.detail_md:
## Sport Portal
**Pitch:** Eliminating $8.36M in annual admin from Victorian school sport
**Live:** schoolsportportal.com.au, sportportal.com.au, sportcarnival.com.au, carnivaltiming.com
**Repos:** LuckDragonAsgard/schoolsportportal + sportportal + sportcarnival-hub

### Four tools, one login
| Tool | URL | What It Does |
|---|---|---|
| School Sport Portal | schoolsportportal.com.au | Public hub. Region -> Division -> District -> School. Parents find fixtures, teams, results. |
| SportCarnival | sportcarnival.com.au | Plan carnival: upload students once, auto-draw heats by age/gender, record results. |
| CarnivalTiming | carnivaltiming.com | On the day: parent volunteers scan QR, tap Finish. Live scoreboard. Replaces timing-gate hire. |
| SportPortal | sportportal.com.au | Onboarding, pricing, account management. The flagship. |

### Architecture
- CF Pages + Firebase (willy-district-sport, australia-southeast1, SDK v9.23.0 compat)
- CF Worker schoolsportportal for /api/* routes
- All data stored in australia-southeast1 (no offshore data — DET IPP 9 compliant)
- Pre-completed PIA template against all 10 IPPs available on request

### Pricing (from pitch)
- Schools: $1/student/yr (~$200/yr for 200-student school)
- District coordinators: $150/yr
- Division coordinators: $250/yr
- Region coordinators: $500/yr
- All coordinator tiers FREE in 2026

### The numbers
- $8,362,146 statewide admin cost eliminated per year
- 37x ROI for a division coordinator from day one
- 1,600 schools, 232 districts, 55 divisions, 16 regions in Victoria
- CRT rate: $70.97/hr (DET Victoria, July 2025)

### Five-year ARR (from pitch)
| Year | Scope | Projected ARR |
|---|---|---|
| 2026 | Pilot — Hobsons Bay + 2 divisions (~200 schools) | $32,000 |
| 2027 | 3 regions, 10 divisions, 50 districts (~500 schools) | $89,000 |
| 2028 | 8 regions, 28 divisions, 120 districts (~900 schools) | $171,000 |
| 2029 | Statewide VIC (55 div, 232 districts, ~1,400 schools) | $280,500 |
| 2030 | VIC lock-in + NSW/QLD pilot | $367,000–500,000 |

### Compliance built in
- PDPA 2014 (Vic) — all 10 IPPs
- Child Safe Standards (Ministerial Order 1359)
- VPDSS (OVIC) — Firebase ISO 27001 + SOC 2 Type II
- NDB scheme (Privacy Act 1988 Cth)
- SSV General Conditions of Competition 2026 age rules
- Pre-completed PIA template available on request
rows.recommendations: Pitch is solid — $8.36M problem, 37x ROI, DET-compliant architecture. Next: get 5 district coordinators to sign up free in 2026. The Williamstown District and Hobsons Bay Division pages are live — demo these in person. Target SSV board meeting for formal endorsement.

## ON ICE / Only Fans Trivia
**Status:** Early stage — no code yet
**Domain:** onlyfanstrivia.com (owned)

### Concepts
ON ICE: live entertainment trivia at ice rinks + venues. Host on tablet, audience on phones. Revenue: venue licence + per-session fee.

Only Fans Trivia: adult-themed trivia subscription. Weekly premium packs. Creator program for question writers.

### Planned architecture
- CF Worker backend (questions, session management, scoring)
- HTML/JS player app (mobile-first)
- D1 for question banks + session state
- Stripe for subscriptions (OFT) / venue licences (ON ICE)

### Status
Concept only. No repo, no code.
rows.recommendations: Pick one to launch first. ON ICE is more unique — pitch to 3 Melbourne ice rinks. Build a 30-min demo night before writing any code.

Extras widget: Rosters, Activity, Swaps, Change PIN. sly-app proxy + sly-api worker. Custom domain superleague.streamlinewebapps.com.
rows.next_action: Wire frontend gaps in Lovable (rosters tab, change-PIN, activity-feed, swap history). Migrate historical team_selections R1–R6 (2,288 rows). Move to luckdragon.io domain. Revoke temp CF token (expires 2026-04-26).
rows.detail_md:
## Super League
**Live:** https://superleague.streamlinewebapps.com
**Repos:** sly-app (worker), sly-api (API), sly-deploy (relay) — LuckDragonAsgard org
**Deploy relay:** https://sly-deploy.pgallivan.workers.dev/deploy/sly-app

### Architecture
- Frontend: Lovable.dev React app at superleague.streamlinewebapps.com
- Proxy Worker: sly-app — intercepts all requests + patches UI (login, banter, scores, player headshots, CSS)
- API Worker: sly-api — /api/login, /api/players, /api/scores, /api/messages, /api/banter, /api/draft-picks
- D1: 8d0b8373-40ea-4174-bfd9-628b790abf92 (791 players, 358 draft picks)
- KV: SLY_STATIC 4f427724561e48f682d4a7c6153d7124

### How sly-app works
Intercepts every request. For HTML, injects a script that fixes: login, banter, scores display, player headshots (AFL CDN, 138 active), The Fund jumpers.

### Deploy quirk
POST raw JS to relay — NEVER JSON-wrap the body.

### State
16 coaches, R7 active, R1-R6 ladder migrated. Version badge top-right.
rows.recommendations: Super League needs active teams. Recruit 2-3 workplaces for a paid season ($200/team). Add live ladder, weekly email summaries, and photo uploads.

rows.description: Golf tours website.

## Rooney Golf Tours
**Live:** https://rooneygolftours.com.au
**Repo:** github.com/PaddyGallivan/rooney-golf-tours
**Stack:** CF Worker + HTML/CSS/JS

### Architecture
- HTML/CSS/JS static site
- CF Worker (serves site + handles contact form)
- Domain: rooneygolftours.com.au

### What it does
Golf tours website for Irish/British expat golfers in Melbourne. Showcases tours, itineraries, pricing. Contact form for enquiries.

### Financials
Y1 $18k (~$3k margin x 6 tours), Y2 $30k, Y3 $54k
rows.recommendations: Build a proper booking and itinerary system. Add Stripe for deposits. Create a 'design my golf trip' lead gen form. Target Irish/British expat golfers in Melbourne.

rows.description: Phone pings when you overuse like or umm.

## Like Umm
**Status:** Idea stage

### Concept
Speech filler tracker. Phone pings when you say like or umm too often. PWA using Web Speech API. Counts filler words in real-time.

### Planned architecture
- PWA using Web Speech API
- CF Worker for session logging

- Free counter, $5/mo paid AI coaching

### Status
Idea only. No domain, no repo, no code.
rows.recommendations: Validate with 10 real users using just the Web Speech API. If demand, add AI coaching via Claude.

rows.detail_md:
## Streamline
**Live:** https://huvfgenbcaiicatvtxak.supabase.co/functions/v1/streamline
**Repo:** github.com/PaddyGallivan/streamline
**Deploy:** Supabase Edge Functions (Deno)

### Architecture
- Backend: Supabase Edge Functions
- AI: Claude Haiku for idea analysis + MVP recommendations
- DB: Supabase Postgres
- Auth: Supabase Auth
- Frontend: HTML/JS served from Edge Function

### What it does
Idea submission platform. Users submit product ideas, community votes. Top ideas get AI-built. Tiers: $29 (analysis), $99 (MVP spec), $299 (AI prototype).
rows.recommendations: Streamline: identify the core workflow it's solving. Build a clear onboarding flow. Target small agencies and freelancers at $29/mo.

rows.description: Personal OS / command centre. 6-worker mesh: asgard, asgard-ai, asgard-auth, asgard-vault, asgard-memory, asgard-comms. D1 projects DB, KV vault. Dashboard v5.8.0: project management, AI chat, Rankings, file uploads per project. PIN-gated security on all secret endpoints.
rows.next_action: File upload from chat (attach files directly in Asgard chat → auto-link to current project). Email to hello@luckdragon.io. AI model bubble. Spend tracker. Remove Stripe tile. Feature-request via email not Slack.
rows.detail_md:
## Asgard
**Live:** https://asgard.pgallivan.workers.dev
**Repo:** github.com/LuckDragonAsgard/asgard-source (auto-committed on every deploy)
**Version:** v8.8.3

### 7-worker mesh
asgard (dashboard), asgard-ai (Claude chat+memory), asgard-tools (deploy relay), asgard-brain (D1 API+PIN auth), asgard-vault (KV secrets), asgard-backup (daily cron), asgard-watchdog (5-min health cron, NEW)

### D1
asgard-brain UUID b6275cb4-9c0f-4649-ae6a-f1c2e70e940f — products table (40 active rows), health_log, health_state, memory tables.

### Auth
Dashboard PIN: 2967 (display). API X-Pin header: PADDY_PIN CF secret value. Jacky: JACKY_PIN CF secret.

### Deploy
POST asgard-tools.pgallivan.workers.dev/admin/deploy with X-Pin: PADDY_PIN.

### Watchdog
https://asgard-watchdog.pgallivan.workers.dev/ — 9 endpoints, 5-min cron, state-change alerts to paddy@luckdragon.io + rooney.jaclyn.l@gmail.com, auto-heals asgard from GitHub.

### Null-byte footgun
Claude Write/Edit pads files with null bytes. Strip before CF deploy: python3 -c open(f,wb).write(open(f,rb).read().replace(nullbyte,empty))
rows.recommendations: Asgard itself — add watchdog dashboard tile showing live health of all workers. Add project revenue tracking from Stripe. Consider making it multi-tenant for other founders.

## Morris (KBT v2)
**Status:** Merged into KBT Platform (id=7)
**Was at:** https://huvfgenbcaiicatvtxak.supabase.co/functions/v1/morris
**Stack:** Supabase Edge Functions

### What it was
KBT API replacement when original kbt-integration CF Worker broke. 13 public + 4 admin endpoints for KBT host/player apps.

### Why merged
Replaced by kbt-api CF Worker (faster, cheaper, consistent stack). Morris no longer called by any client.
rows.recommendations: No action needed — merged. kbt-api CF Worker is the canonical KBT API. Morris Supabase function can be left dormant or deleted.

rows.description: iDoceo replacement for primary schools. Full classroom management: CSV class lists from Compass, roll marking, gradebook, random picker, lesson planner, week timetable, school-wide notices + bell times via shared D1. Sell-to-schools play.
rows.next_action: Get Mat Montebello to start using it; gather feedback; (a) CSV import for class rolls, (b) per-school admin onboarding flow, (c) move custom domain to a school-neutral name (currently on carnivaltiming.com which is wrong for a school product). Also rotate WPS_ADMIN_PIN from 9999.
rows.notes: Live since 2026-04-27. Source-of-truth = github.com/LuckDragonAsgard/wps-hub. Handover at docs/HANDOVER.md in repo. Pre-recovery snapshot pinned as release pre-recovery-2026-04-27. ZERO Drive footprint — completely off Drive. D1 wps-hub-db (uuid d89d5e1b-a9b0-49ad-800d-0cee8f2925b3) intact. 2 admins seeded (Mat + Paddy), 10 bell times seeded.
rows.key_features: Google sign-in, CSV class import, per-class roll, gradebook, groups, random picker, week planner, school-wide notices, bell times, admin PIN gate, D1 sync, role-based writes
rows.detail_md:
## WPS Hub v3
**Live:** https://wps.carnivaltiming.com (moving to schoolstaffhub.com.au)
**Repo:** github.com/LuckDragonAsgard/wps-hub
**Worker:** wps-hub-v3 on Luck Dragon Main (a6f47c17)
**D1:** wps-hub-db UUID d89d5e1b-a9b0-49ad-800d-0cee8f2925b3

### Architecture
- Frontend: 71KB HTML PWA (index.html in repo root) — fetched from GitHub raw at runtime (5-min Worker cache)
- Worker: worker.js — multi-tenant, routes /api/* by school_id, serves /super super-admin UI
- D1: bell times, notices, school events, timetable, admin users (per school_id)
- Multi-tenancy: school resolved from X-School-Id header -> school= param -> hostname lookup -> fallback wps
- Per-teacher data: class rolls, gradebook, student notes in browser localStorage ONLY (student PII safe, never synced to server)

### Schools
wps = Williamstown Primary, demo = Demo Primary

### Auth
WPS_ADMIN_PIN CF secret. Google sign-in for teachers.

### Pending
- Register schoolstaffhub.com.au at VentraIP -> NS coraline+renan -> goes live
- Wire CF Workers Builds for auto-deploy on git push
- Walk Mat Montebello through onboarding (docs/MAT-ONBOARDING.md)
rows.recommendations: WPS Hub v3: pitch to 3 more schools. Build a 'carnival results export to Athletics Victoria' feature — that's the biggest pain point for school sports coordinators.

rows.summary: Fixed 4 code bugs + restored broken admin: bookings/count auth, manifest/icon 404s, dead CSS, streetAddress + meta
rows.details: 1) /api/bookings/count auth removed — public 200 with counts only (worker v9.19). 2) Created manifest-public.json + icon-public-192.png (no more 404s). 3) Stripped 404 lines / 14.85KB of dead CSS from index.html (perks/spots/bb-carousel/modal/seats/cap/pax/info/gallery families + .hero h1 + @keyframes growl). 4) Schema.org streetAddress "Riviera" → "55 Cumberland Dr" (×2) and og:title + meta description "to Marvel" → "to and from Marvel". BONUS: bomberboat-admin.html in bb-deploy-stage was empty (Drive sync corruption) → live admin returned blank — restored from CF Pages preview c3bc0a60 (130855 bytes), deployed via wrangler. Added bootstrap-from-prod.ps1 to bb-deploy-stage + hooked into deploy-redesign.bat to self-heal empty/missing files on future deploys.

rows.summary: Bomber Boat admin restored. Local watcher (bb-watch.ps1) and 8+ deploy .bat files retired (replaced with redirect stubs). 3 outstanding: sly-deploy + zone-setup blocked by GH push protection (hardcoded secrets in source — need rotation), v0-dental-loyalty-app repo not owned by PaddyGallivan token. rows.summary: YES — bookings work end-to-end on bomberboat.com.au. POST /api/book → D1 row 23 → Stripe url + Resend email + cancel_token returned. Cancel via GET /api/cancel?token=... worked. Count: 0→1→0.
rows.details:
Verification 2026-04-28 (autonomous overnight task while Paddy asleep).

VERDICT: Bookings work end-to-end. The "/api/bookings/count returns 0" public probe is accurate ground-truth: there are simply no real bookings yet.

ROUTE: POST https://bomber-boat-api.pgallivan.workers.dev/api/book (also reachable via https://bomberboat.com.au/api/book; /api/bookings legacy path also exists).
AUTH: None for booking creation. Admin endpoints (GET /api/bookings, /api/bookings-admin, /api/captain-pin) require X-API-Key.
REQUEST SHAPE (Stripe path used by live form):
{
  "name":"<contactEmail>",
  "phone":"",
  "email":"<contactEmail>",
  "game":"<exact game string from /api/schedule>",
  "fare":"return|oneway_to|oneway_from",
  "pass_type":"adult|u18",
  "pay":"stripe",
  "adults":N,
  "u18":N,
  "notes":"..."
}
RESPONSE (201): { booking:{id, name, ..., cancel_token, created_at, ...}, stripe_url, cancel_token, email:{ok,id} }

TEST RUN:
- POST with name="TEST_AUTOMATED_DELETE_ME", email="test+automated@bomberboat.com.au", game="Round 8 — 2 May 2026 vs Brisbane Lions (Sat 12:35pm)", fare=return, adults=1.
- Got 201, booking id 23, stripe_url=cs_live_..., cancel_token=LxbmWUtp8L, Resend email id 16e9c9a8-c300-4b9e-b383-589cbdd808c3.
- /api/bookings/count went 0 -> 1 (per_game shows Round 8: 1).
- Cancelled via GET /api/cancel?token=LxbmWUtp8L (POST with body returned 400 "Missing token" — endpoint reads token from query string only).
- /api/bookings/count back to 0 — clean.

D1 NOTE: I could not query D1 directly. Vault PIN 2967 was rejected by both asgard-vault (version 1.2.0-pin-rotation) and asgard-brain. CF MCP oauth token is also invalid. asgard-comms still accepts X-Pin: 2967 — its PIN scheme is separate. Worker D1 binding details could not be inspected without CF token.

SIDE EFFECT TO CLEAN UP: A confirmation email was sent to test+automated@bomberboat.com.au — will land in whatever catch-all handles that domain. Just delete it.

ACTIONS: None. System is healthy.

NEXT-MORNING PIN NOTE: vault and brain PINs have rotated off 2967. Need to fetch the new PIN from local copy or rotate again before secrets-dependent automation can resume. asgard-comms is unaffected.
